degraded: complexity classifier returned risk_flag cross_component from message-prose keywords (verifier machinery); the diff touches NO cross_component file pattern (iterate_checks is deliberately excluded — self-gating is circular), so the F11 check_integration_coverage recompute does NOT fire. A real category:integration behavior is supplied anyway (below).

surface_verification.justification: Framework tooling change: two F11 iterate-finalization verifier gates (shared/scripts/tools/verifiers/layer_coverage.py + _layer_coverage_{core,removal,regen,evidence}.py) + a shared emit-side (shared/scripts/lib/evidence_drop.py) + F5.md prose. No runnable app surface (web/cli/api) added or modified. Exercised by the CLI surface (evidence_drop.py stage/clear + verify_iterate_finalization.py) plus the pytest suites (shared, iterate 476, compliance 1104) AND a REAL-git end-to-end integration+hardening suite (test_layer_coverage_gate_integration.py + test_layer_coverage_hardening.py, 15 tests: removal blocks on a standing/renamed/moved test and a wholesale row deletion, an infra gap/unresolvable base ERRORs at medium+, cross-layer blocks a skipped/foreign/stale-run e2e, a relocation + refactor do NOT block) that composes the gate with the TT1 collector + TT-EV evidence + git-archive regeneration.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — removal→orphan gate: removing an FR while its base-linked test still stands FAILs; deleting or retargeting to a live FR passes; a bare @FR tag removal (escape into untagged_tests) FAILs

AC2 — change→cross-layer gate: a behaviour-changed FR requiring [unit,e2e] FAILs when a required layer is not executed-passing and passes only when ALL are; a pure refactor with no spec delta triggers nothing
AC3 — both gates REGENERATE base+head (a hand-edited committed manifest cannot satisfy them); an empty FR→behaviour mapping emits could-not-determine WARN, never a silent pass
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_layer_coverage_core.py::test_cross_layer_could_not_determine_when_spec_changed_but_no_fr + ::test_cross_layer_could_not_determine_when_spec_changed_but_no_row_delta PASSED; regeneration proven by the real-git integration suite (archives base+head, never reads the committed artifact)

behaviors.behavior: AC4 — NEW tests RED-before/green-after over P1's removal/behaviour-change/refactor diff fixtures + execution-evidence; framework suites green
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_layer_coverage.py (fixture-driven build_manifest over on-disk base/head) + test_layer_coverage_core.py + test_evidence_drop.py PASSED; shared 4164 / iterate 476 / compliance 1104 green

behaviors.behavior: AC5 — footprint within the verifiers module + run_all_checks wiring + tests; every new source/test file ≤300 LOC; bloat baseline NOT ratcheted (the emit-side lives in shared/scripts/lib and surface_verification.py was left untouched to avoid ratcheting its grandfathered 463-LOC entry)
behaviors.evidence: wc -l all new source ≤300 (core 190, removal 263, regen 257, evidence 87, layer_coverage 227, evidence_drop 187, _migration_check 52) + all new tests ≤300; shipwright_bloat_baseline.json unchanged (iterate_checks + common.py kept under baseline via the _migration_check extraction + docstring compaction); both gates registered in run_all_checks (test_layer_coverage_core.py::test_both_gates_registered_in_run_all_checks PASSED)

behaviors.behavior: cross_component composition (category:integration) — the gate composes with the TT1 collector + TT-EV execution evidence + git-diff base/head regeneration on REAL git
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_layer_coverage_gate_integration.py (9 real-git tests: git archive base+head → build_manifest → refresh_index evidence → gate verdict) PASSED — the reference-pattern analogue of test_parallel_merge_cascade_integration.py

behaviors.behavior: External-review MUST-FIX (7-round GPT+Gemini panel) — stale/planted evidence index is REGENERATED from staged reports (R3); evidence is HEAD-attributable (mandatory head_commit + ancestor check); removal escapes (still-tagged, bare-strip, file-rename, function-rename, move+kept-tag via git-independent orphan sweep, move+untagged same-name) are HARD; collision/legacy gaps are advisory WARN, not silent green
Security (Gemini panel) — the pre-3.12 tar-extract fallback rejects path traversal (containment, not a startswith prefix) AND symlink/hardlink/device members

Coordinator adversarial-panel (code+doubt+Codex) MUST-FIX — (1) an infra gap ERRORs/blocks at medium+ (never a green SKIP), SKIPs below; (2) evidence is built IN-MEMORY from ONLY the provenance-staged reports (no refresh_index root-fallback ingestion, no index write), and stage_reports FAILs on an un-purgeable stale report; (3) a wholesale FR-row deletion with a surviving test FAILs while a relocation is not false-red; (4) no commit^ base fallback → an unresolvable base ERRORs; removal floors to all complexities (SHOULD-6); advisory/could-not-determine are --strict-exempt (SHOULD-7)
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_layer_coverage_hardening.py (missing-commit ERROR@medium / SKIP<medium, no-base-ref ERROR, deleted-row FAIL, relocation not-false-red, stale-run + foreign-head evidence blocked) PASSED; test_layer_coverage_core.py::test_fresh_evidence_ignores_repo_root_report_fallback + ::test_fresh_evidence_builds_from_reports_ignoring_planted_index PASSED; test_evidence_drop stage/clear raise-on-failure

behaviors.behavior: Coordinator panel round-3 (final) MEDIUM residuals — FIX 1: a git SUBPROCESS failure/timeout on a real medium+ work-tree ERRORs (fail-closed), distinguished from a CLEAN non-git context which SKIPs (a tri-state _git_context, no longer the fail-open _git_available conflation); FIX 2: the base ref also resolves via the branch's upstream @{u}, so an adopted repo with a develop/trunk default + unset origin/HEAD is not false-RED, while a truly unresolvable base still ERRORs
